steps.assistant_text: Split out of -O2 -g3 tail3a into a new -O0 unit (tail3a TRUNCATE 0x14D8->0x848; 0x10C8C..0x116C7 INCLUDE_ASM remainder moved to tail3a_10C8C.c). Keys: struct MEMBER-ARRAY form for the call arg (&a0->recs[a0->count].sub) is load-bearing — it emits addu a0,<base>,<idx> (base-first) where every pointer-arithmetic/cast-array spelling emits idx-first; store addresses fold either way so only the address-as-value site distinguishes. Final count+=1 goes through a register pointer var (colors s0).
